completedWork: Power Factor Correction Simulation - NEW: Interactive visualization of inductive loads and power factor correction with capacitor bank compensation. Features power triangle diagram with real-time updates, reactive power calculations, before/after PF comparison, current reduction analysis, auto-calculate capacitor sizing, and comprehensive educational content on PF correction principles.

Voltage Drop Calculator - NEW: Complete voltage drop calculation tool for electrical design. Supports 3-phase and 1-phase systems, conductor material selection (Copper/Aluminum), AWG/mm² wire sizes from 0.5mm² to 240mm², temperature compensation, NEC/IEC compliance checking, visual voltage drop representation with source-to-load diagram, efficiency calculations, and intelligent wire size recommendations.
